libraries.description: Typed, permission-aware tools with tests and audit metadata.

libraries.name: Webhooks Library

libraries.description: Reusable validation and delivery workflows with least privilege.
libraries.name: Workflows Library

public_contract.data_policy: Only generated counts, readiness labels, missions, and governance summaries are published.

systems.detail: Static Buddy, Studio, dashboard, division, and catalog pages pass deployment preflight.
systems.label: Public website

systems.detail: 1,248 bot records have 100-slot capability blueprints and per-bot library contracts.
systems.label: Capabilities and libraries

systems.detail: 232 product bot records remain in the generated completion queue.
systems.label: Native runtimes

systems.detail: The public page creates local task packets. Server-side execution is not exposed from the static site.
systems.label: Buddy command interface

systems.detail: Browser-based project packets, recording, consent checks, and local previews are available; rendering engines are optional.
systems.label: Creative Studio

systems.detail: No public page moves money, posts content, contacts people, or changes accounts without a configured backend and approval.
systems.label: Payments and external actions
